---
title: Data submission tools and instructions
---

Submit your datasets to BigPicture. Follow the workflow below, or jump to a specific resource.

## Quick start

**New to submission?**
Start with [installation](installation/index.qmd), then follow the [pipeline](pipeline/index.qmd).

**Need help?** See [FAQ](faq/index.qmd), [community resources](community/index.qmd), or [technical support](support.qmd).

## Main entry points

- [Installation guide](installation/index.qmd) — install required tools
- [Configuration setup](configuration/index.qmd) — config files needed
- [Pipeline steps](pipeline/index.qmd) — data extraction through upload
- [Validation rules](validation/index.qmd) — pre-submission checks

## Additional resources

- [Testing guide](testing/index.qmd)
- [Best practices](best-practices/index.qmd)
- [FAQ](faq/index.qmd)
- [Community](community/index.qmd)

## Legacy

**Internal guidelines** [(archived reference)](https://bigpictureeu.sharepoint.com/:w:/r/sites/wp3/Public%20documents/Data%20Submission%20Guidance%20documents/Data%20Contribution/Guideline%20Data%20Contribution%20of%20anonymous,%20clinical%20data%20for%20implementation%20of%20the%20action%20by%20Bigpicture%20beneficiaries_v1.3.docx?d=w54e831a5940d47328eacb27d8d9793e8&csf=1&web=1&e=2H6ixs) — being phased out. Use this site for current instructions.

## Need help?

- **Data submission:** [bp-ops](mailto:{{< var email.helpdesk >}})
- **Support:** [servicedesk](mailto:{{< var email.servicedesk >}})
